title: [SYS] Implement OBC stub — configurable OBSW behaviour simulator
body:
## Objective
Implement an OBC stub that simulates OBSW behaviour via configurable rules. Replaces ObcEquipment for closed-loop system validation without a real OBSW binary.

## Design
```python
stub = ObcStub(rules=[
    Rule(
        name='low_battery_safe_mode',
        condition=lambda store: store.read('eps.battery.soc').value < 0.3,
        action=lambda cmd_store, t: cmd_store.inject('dhs.obc.mode_cmd', MODE_SAFE, t=t)
    ),
    Rule(
        name='st_valid_enable_rw',
        condition=lambda store: store.read('aocs.str1.validity').value > 0.5,
        action=lambda cmd_store, t: cmd_store.inject('aocs.rw1.torque_cmd', 0.05, t=t)
    ),
])
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- ObcStub extends ObcEquipment
- Rule dataclass: name, condition(store)->bool, action(cmd_store, t)->None
- Rules evaluated each tick in declared order
- Rules can be enabled/disabled at runtime
- Stub generates PUS TM (HK, events) same as ObcEquipment
- Unit tests cover rule evaluation, enable/disable, PUS TM generation

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038

title: [SYS] Full platform scenario — safe mode recovery
body:
## Objective
Implement a closed-loop safe mode recovery scenario using the OBC stub.

## Scenario
1. Spacecraft starts tumbling in eclipse (low SoC, no attitude)
2. CSS detects sun direction
3. PCDU begins charging from solar arrays
4. OBC stub: SoC > 0.4 → transition to NOMINAL
5. ST powers on, acquires attitude
6. OBC stub: ST valid → enable RW detumbling torques
7. RW reduces tumbling rate

## Acceptance Criteria
- Full scenario runs end-to-end
- OBC stub drives all transitions via rules
- All FDIR events observable via ParameterStore
- Campaign YAML: campaigns/safe_mode_recovery.yaml

## Implements
SVF-DEV-050, SVF-DEV-051

title: [SYS] Full platform scenario — nominal operations loop
body:
## Objective
Implement a closed-loop nominal operations scenario.

## Scenario
1. Spacecraft in NOMINAL mode, ST tracking
2. OBC stub maintains RW speed within bounds
3. OBC generates HK every second
4. Ground sends S17 are-you-alive TC
5. OBC responds with TM(17,2)
6. Ground sends S20 parameter set
7. OBC routes to equipment

## Acceptance Criteria
- Full scenario runs end-to-end
- HK TM generated and verifiable
- PUS TC/TM roundtrip validated
- Campaign YAML: campaigns/nominal_ops.yaml

## Implements
SVF-DEV-050, SVF-DEV-051

title: [SYS] Full platform scenario — ground contact pass
body:
## Objective
Implement a ground contact pass scenario.

## Scenario
1. SBT powered off initially
2. Ground station rises above horizon — signal level increases
3. SBT acquires carrier lock
4. Ground sends TC(17,1) are-you-alive
5. OBC responds TM(17,2)
6. Ground sends TC(20,1) mode command
7. OBC executes, generates TM(1,7) completion
8. SBT downlinks TM
9. Ground station sets below horizon — lock lost

## Acceptance Criteria
- Full contact pass scenario end-to-end
- Lock acquisition and loss observable
- TC/TM exchange verified
- Campaign YAML: campaigns/contact_pass.yaml

## Implements
SVF-DEV-050, SVF-DEV-051

title: [SYS] Full platform scenario — FDIR chain
body:
## Objective
Implement a closed-loop FDIR scenario where equipment fault triggers OBC stub response.

## Scenario
1. Spacecraft in NOMINAL mode, RW spinning
2. 1553 NO_RESPONSE fault injected on RW RT
3. OBC stub detects RW speed frozen in HK
4. OBC stub generates S5 anomaly event
5. OBC stub commands mode to SAFE
6. Ground receives event via TM
7. Fault cleared — OBC stub transitions back to NOMINAL

## Acceptance Criteria
- Full FDIR chain observable end-to-end
- S5 event generated on fault detection
- Mode transition driven by stub rule
- Campaign YAML: campaigns/fdir_chain.yaml

## Implements
SVF-DEV-050, SVF-DEV-051

title: [SYS] Implement HIL adapter plug-in point
body:
## Objective
Define the HIL adapter interface that the OBC emulator will implement when it arrives. The adapter replaces ObcStub transparently.

## Design
```python
class HilAdapter(Equipment, ABC):
    @abstractmethod
    def connect(self) -> None: ...  # establish connection to emulator
    @abstractmethod
    def disconnect(self) -> None: ... # clean shutdown
    @abstractmethod
    def is_connected(self) -> bool: ...
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- HilAdapter ABC defined
- ObcStub implements HilAdapter interface
- SimulationMaster accepts HilAdapter in place of ObcEquipment
- Swap from stub to real emulator is one line at composition root
- Documentation updated

## Implements
SVF-DEV-038
